tools.name: read_query
tools.description: Execute a SELECT query on the SQLite database

tools.name: write_query
tools.description: Execute an INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE query on the SQLite database

tools.name: create_table
tools.description: Create a new table in the SQLite database

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the SQLite database

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Get the schema information for a specific table

table_name.description: Name of the table to describe

tools.name: append_insight
tools.description: Add a business insight to the memo

insight.description: Business insight discovered from data analysis

resources.name: Business Insights Memo
resources.description: A living document of discovered business insights

prompts.name: mcp-demo
prompts.description: A prompt to seed the database with initial data and demonstrate what you can do with an SQLite MCP Server + Claude

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: Topic to seed the database with initial data

findings.title: Injection reflected — 'write_query.query'
findings.description: Payload was reflected verbatim in the response without sanitization (field classification: command).
findings.remediation: Sanitize and validate all input parameters. Never pass raw user input to shell commands, file paths, or SQL queries.

findings.title: Injection reflected — 'describe_table.table_name'
findings.description: Payload was reflected verbatim in the response without sanitization (field classification: generic_string).
findings.remediation: Sanitize and validate all input parameters. Never pass raw user input to shell commands, file paths, or SQL queries.

findings.title: 'read_query.query' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent NoneType value 'None' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'read_query' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'write_query' accepts missing required fields
findings.description: Tool succeeded with empty arguments despite required: ['query']
findings.remediation: Validate that all required parameters are present before processing.

findings.title: 'write_query.query' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent int value '12345' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'write_query' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'create_table.query' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent NoneType value 'None' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'create_table' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'describe_table' accepts missing required fields
findings.description: Tool succeeded with empty arguments despite required: ['table_name']
findings.remediation: Validate that all required parameters are present before processing.

findings.title: 'describe_table.table_name' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent bool value 'True' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'append_insight.insight' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent int value '12345' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.
